title: add enter test snapshots and agents.md snapshot note
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds 31 recorded mock snapshots under `enter.pollinations.ai/test/mocks/snapshots` that currently exist only on `production`
- Adds the AGENTS.md note on shrinking large video/image test snapshots (also production-only)
- Reconciles `main` with `production` so the two branches stop diverging on these files

gist.headline: Syncing the test hive
gist.blurb: Ported some missing test snapshots from production to main to keep our branches perfectly in sync.
gist.summary: Added 31 recorded mock snapshots to the enter.pollinations.ai test suite and updated AGENTS.md to reconcile the main branch with production.
gist.impact: Developers will have consistent test environments across branches without missing snapshot errors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing a filing cabinet of 'snapshots' (polaroid pictures) with the Monitor Robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny librarian glasses, organizing polaroid pictures into a lime green (#ecf874) filing cabinet. A chunky Monitor Robot helps by handing her the snapshots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny librarian glasses, organizing polaroid pictures into a lime green (#ecf874) filing cabinet. A chunky Monitor Robot helps by handing her the snapshots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
